creator: steveo@uschartco.com
text:
I setup a server using FreeBSD 7.0, while on the same network everything worked fine. I shipped it to my Chicago office and now I can't access any IP service from Windows Vista or Macintosh OS X machines or other BSD servers. If I am on the local network they connect just fine. I can access them from Windows XP machines from any network.

Help!

I don't want to roll back.

Steve
